# idsec_identity_user_info (Data Source)

The Identity service user info data source. It reads the user info information and metadata.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "idsec_identity_user_info" "my_user_info" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `first_name` (String) First name of the user
- `groups` (Dynamic) AD groups of the user
- `home_number` (String) Home number of the user
- `last_name` (String) Last name of the user
- `manager` (String) Manager of the user
- `rights` (List of String) Administrative rights of the user
- `roles` (Dynamic) Roles of the user
- `username` (String) Username info
